title: Auto-Chess Game with Ancient Egyptian War Theme

requirements.text: Implement a full auto-chess game loop: a preparation phase where the player buys and places Egyptian units on a hex/grid board, and a combat phase where units automatically battle enemy units. Include rounds, a shop system with random unit offerings, gold economy (earn gold per round, interest mechanic), player health points that decrease on losses, and a game-over condition.

quotes: 生成一个自走棋类型的游戏

acceptanceCriteria: Player can see a shop with 3–5 random Egyptian units to purchase each round
Player can drag units from bench to the battle board grid
After preparation time ends, combat phase starts automatically
Units attack enemy units autonomously during combat
Player loses HP when their army is defeated; game ends at 0 HP
Gold system: player earns gold each round and can spend it on units

requirements.text: Create a roster of at least 8 distinct Egyptian-themed unit types: Pharaoh (legendary melee tank), Anubis Guard (melee fighter), Ra Priest (ranged magical attacker), Isis Sorceress (healer/support), Charioteer (fast ranged), Sphinx (area-damage caster), Horus Archer (ranged DPS), and Mummy Warrior (undead melee). Each unit has name, portrait icon, tier (1–3 star upgrade), attack, HP, ability description, and an Egyptian faction/synergy tag.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 8 unit types are selectable from the shop
Each unit displays name, tier stars, HP bar, and attack stat
Units have unique ability descriptions shown on hover/click
Synergy tags (e.g., 'Priest', 'Warrior', 'Royal') are visible on unit cards

requirements.text: Implement a synergy/trait system with at least 4 Egyptian-themed synergies: 'Children of Ra' (Priests — bonus magic damage), 'Pharaoh's Guard' (Warriors — bonus armor), 'Desert Nomads' (Charioteers — bonus speed), 'Undead Legion' (Mummies — HP regeneration). Activating synergies at threshold counts (e.g., 2/4 units) grants passive buffs to all matching units.
acceptanceCriteria: Synergy panel shows all active synergies and their activation status
Placing the required number of synergy units activates the corresponding buff
Active synergy buffs are visually highlighted in the synergy panel

requirements.text: Build a 2D top-down battle board using an 8×4 hex or square grid. Animate units moving toward enemies and attacking during the combat phase. Show floating damage numbers, HP bars above units, and death animations (units fade/crumble). Use Egyptian-themed visual effects: golden glow for Ra abilities, sand particle bursts for desert units, hieroglyph flash for magical spells.
acceptanceCriteria: Battle board renders as a grid with distinct friendly and enemy halves
Units visually move toward their targets during combat
HP bars update in real time during combat
Floating damage numbers appear on hit
Units have a death animation when HP reaches 0

requirements.text: Design the entire UI with an ancient Egyptian aesthetic: sandy desert color palette (gold, sand beige, turquoise, dark ochre), hieroglyph-style decorative borders on panels, papyrus-textured card backgrounds, and Egyptian iconography (scarab, Eye of Horus, ankh, pyramid silhouettes) used as decorative elements throughout the interface. Use a serif or hieroglyph-inspired font for headings.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette is consistently gold, sand, turquoise, and ochre throughout the app
Panel borders and headers feature Egyptian-style decorative motifs
Unit cards use a papyrus-like textured background style
At least one Egyptian symbol (scarab, ankh, Eye of Horus) appears in the UI chrome

requirements.text: Create a main menu screen with the game title 'Pharaoh's Conquest', a Start Game button, and a How to Play modal explaining the auto-chess rules. Include a round tracker HUD showing current round number, player HP, current gold, and the active synergies panel during gameplay.

quotes: 生成一个自走棋类型的游戏

acceptanceCriteria: Main menu displays game title and Start Game button
How to Play modal opens and explains preparation/combat phases and synergies
In-game HUD shows round number, player HP, and current gold at all times
Active synergies panel is visible during gameplay

requirements.text: Render the generated Egyptian-themed images as static assets and integrate them into the UI: use the desert background on the main menu and battle board, the Egyptian panel border frame on all game panels, and unit portrait icons on unit cards and the shop.
acceptanceCriteria: Main menu background uses the desert panorama image
Battle board background uses the desert battle scene image
Unit card portraits use the corresponding Egyptian unit portrait images
Panel frames use the decorative Egyptian border image

constraints: All game state must be managed entirely on the frontend — no backend persistence required
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Use only React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS — no additional game engine libraries
nonGoals: Backend leaderboard or save state persistence

required: Wide panoramic desert landscape with pyramids, sphinx silhouette, and a golden sunset sky, suitable as a menu background (egypt-menu-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Top-down sandy desert battle grid background with stone tile grid lines, hieroglyph markings along the border edges, and a faint desert dune horizon (egypt-battle-board.dim_1200x600.png)
Ornate Egyptian decorative panel border frame with gold hieroglyph carvings, scarab beetles at corners, and turquoise inlay accents on a dark stone background (egypt-panel-frame.dim_800x600.png)
Egyptian warrior soldier portrait bust, wearing golden armor and blue Nemes headcloth, illustrated in a stylized card art style (unit-pharaoh.dim_256x256.png)
Jackal-headed Anubis guardian warrior portrait holding a golden staff, illustrated in card art style (unit-anubis-guard.dim_256x256.png)
Robed Egyptian priest with sun disc headdress and a glowing Ra eye staff, illustrated in card art style (unit-ra-priest.dim_256x256.png)
Egyptian sorceress with Isis wings and flowing white robes, illustrated in card art style (unit-isis-sorceress.dim_256x256.png)
Ancient Egyptian chariot warrior with bow and arrow on a horse-drawn chariot, illustrated in card art style (unit-charioteer.dim_256x256.png)
Crouching stone sphinx with glowing golden eyes and ancient runes, illustrated in card art style (unit-sphinx.dim_256x256.png)
Falcon-headed Horus archer wearing red and gold armor drawing a blue energy bow, illustrated in card art style (unit-horus-archer.dim_256x256.png)
Bandaged undead Egyptian mummy warrior with glowing green eyes and a cracked khopesh sword, illustrated in card art style (unit-mummy-warrior.dim_256x256.png)
